titlStmt.titl: DDI description: Cultural Heritage of Finland 2014

citation.biblCit: Cultural Heritage of Finland 2014 [metadata]. Metadata version 1.0.0 (2015-01-15). Finnish Social Science Data Archive [producer and distributor]. DOI: https://doi.org/10.60686/t-fsd2981; URN: https://urn.fi/urn:nbn:fi:fsd:T-FSD2981

holdings.location: Finnish Social Science Data Archive FSD

docDscr.notes: FSD:n aineistokuvailut (FSD metadata records), joiden tekijä on Suomen yhteiskuntatieteellinen tietoarkisto (Finnish Social Science Data Archive), on lisensoitu Creative Commons 1.0 Yleismaailmallinen (CC0 1.0) -lisenssillä.

FSD:n aineistokuvailut (FSD metadata records) by Suomen yhteiskuntatieteellinen tietoarkisto (Finnish Social Science Data Archive) are licensed under a Creative Commons 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) license.

FSD:n aineistokuvailut (FSD metadata records) av Finlands samhällsvetenskapliga dataarkiv (Finnish Social Science Data Archive) är licensierade under en Creative Commons 1.0 Universiell (CC0 1.0) licens.

prodStmt.copyright: In accordance with the agreement between FSD and the depositor.

serInfo.p: Individual datasets that do not belong to any series.

citation.biblCit: National Board of Antiquities & Finnish Local Heritage Federation: Cultural Heritage of Finland 2014 [dataset]. Data version 1.0 (2015-01-15). Finnish Social Science Data Archive [distributor]. DOI: https://doi.org/10.60686/t-fsd2981; URN: https://urn.fi/urn:nbn:fi:fsd:T-FSD2981

holdings.location: Finnish Social Science Data Archive FSD

abstract.p: Finland's National Board of Antiquities and the Finnish Local Heritage Federation conducted this survey to gather views and ideas on cultural heritage. Data were gathered with an open web consultation where anyone could respond to a survey containing open-ended questions. The aim was to gather information for the preparation of the ratification of Council of Europe Framework Convention on the Value of Cultural Heritage for Society (Faro Convention).

Questions charted, for instance, what kind of cultural heritage the respondents would like to pass down to others, what kind of places and locations they valued in their own environment, potential benefits and adverse effects of cultural heritage, and ideas on ways and means of developing and transmitting cultural heritage. The archived dataset is a text file containg the questions and the respondents' answers to each question. It is not possible to see how one particular respondent had answered to different questions. There were 130 respondents.
The dataset is only available in Finnish.

sampProc.p: Anyone could responde to the survey on otakantaa.fi web portal.

method.stdyClas: Detailed and specific data description in Finnish and English. The data are checked and processed in detail. If necessary, the data are anonymised.

setAvail.collSize: Responses in one RTF file. Each question has 130 responses.

useStmt.restrctn: The dataset is (A) openly available for all users without registration (CC BY 4.0).
useStmt.citReq: The data and its creators shall be cited in all publications and presentations for which the data have been used. The bibliographic citation may be in the form suggested by the archive or in the form required by the publication.
useStmt.deposReq: Notify FSD of all publications where you have used the data by sending the citation information to user-services.fsd@tuni.fi.
useStmt.disclaimer: The original data creators and the archive bear no responsibility for any results or interpretations arising from the reuse of the data.

dataAccs.notes: Names and email addresses of the respondents were removed from the data as well as web addresses constituting indirect indetifiers. Anonymisation and omissions are marked with [[square brackets]].

othrStdyMat.relPubl:
Kohti kestävää kulttuuriperintötyötä. Taustaselvitys Faron yleissopimuksen voimaansaattamiseksi Suomessa (2015). Toim. Ulla Salmela, Hannu Matikka, Pauliina Latvala ja Petja Kauppi. Helsinki: Museovirasto.
Kohti kestävää kulttuuriperintötyötä. Taustaselvitys Faron yleissopimuksen voimaansaattamiseksi Suomessa
